name: my239-frontend
description: npm workspace root for the my239 frontend monorepo: web (Vite + React) and a platform-agnostic shared TypeScript package consumed by both web and a future React Native (Expo) app.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@my239/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=my239-web
scripts.test: npm run test:shared && npm run test:web
